function solve(words) {

   const n = words.length;

   if (n === 0) return [];

   // compute lcp array

   const lcp = [];

   for (let j = 0; j < n - 1; j++) {

       lcp[j] = lcpBetween(words[j], words[j+1]);

   }

   // compute prefix_max and suffix_max

   const prefix_max = new Array(lcp.length);

   prefix_max[0] = lcp[0];

   for (let i = 1; i < lcp.length; i++) {

       prefix_max[i] = Math.max(prefix_max[i-1], lcp[i]);

   }

   const suffix_max = new Array(lcp.length);

   suffix_max[lcp.length - 1] = lcp[lcp.length - 1];

   for (let i = lcp.length - 2; i >= 0; i--) {

       suffix_max[i] = Math.max(suffix_max[i+1], lcp[i]);

   }

   // now compute answer array

   const answer = new Array(n);

   for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

       if (n === 1 || n === 2) {

           answer[i] = 0;

           continue;

       }

       let original_max;

       if (i === 0) {

           if (lcp.length >= 2) {

               original_max = suffix_max[1];

           } else {

               original_max = 0;

           }

       } else if (i === n - 1) {

           if (lcp.length >= 1) {

               original_max = prefix_max[lcp.length - 2];

           } else {

               original_max = 0;

           }

       } else {

           let left = 0;

           if (i - 2 >= 0) {

               left = prefix_max[i - 2];

           }

           let right = 0;

           if (i + 1 <= lcp.length - 1) {

               right = suffix_max[i + 1];

           }

           original_max = Math.max(left, right);

       }

       let new_lcp = 0;

       if (i >= 1 && i <= n - 2) {

           const a = words[i - 1];

           const b = words[i + 1];

           new_lcp = lcpBetween(a, b);

       }

       answer[i] = Math.max(original_max, new_lcp);

   }

   return answer;

}
